variants.title: Filtrec R660G15B0 Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R660G15B0. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R660G15B0 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Outer Diameter: 118.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 57.3 mm, Length: 163.0 mm

variants.title: MicroFit® MFHR56264 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec R660G15B0
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHR56264 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec R660G15B0
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHR56264 UltraGen III Return Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Outer Diameter: 118.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 57.3 mm, Length: 163.0 mm
